title: LazyChests
description: Automatic Sell Chests With Configurable Prices & Admin Controls.
body:
# Check out caninecraft.reviverealm.net

**Lazychests** is a powerful autosell chest plugin designed to streamline item sales and simplify server economy management. Players can deposit items directly into a Lazy Chest or route items through hoppers, and Lazychests will automatically sell supported items using prices defined in a fully customizable `config.yml`.

Lazychests integrates with **Vault** and popular economy plugins such as **EssentialsX**, ensuring reliable and consistent transaction handling. Server owners retain full control over item pricing and sell behavior, making it easy to balance the economy to fit their server’s needs.

This update significantly expands Lazychests with new administrative tools, quality-of-life improvements, and deeper economy insight.

---

## New & Updated Features

### Admin Management & Oversight

* Admin GUI to view all players who own Lazy Chests, including offline players
* Per-player Lazy Chest list GUI with pagination
* Ability to teleport to or inspect any Lazy Chest directly from the admin GUI
* Safe teleport placement in front of the chest to avoid hopper interference

### Economy Enhancements

* Persistent lifetime earnings tracking per Lazy Chest
* Lifetime earnings displayed directly in the Lazy Chest inventory title
* Improved sales broadcast messages showing itemized counts and total earnings
* Hopper-safe selling with no forced chunk loading

### Stability & Performance

* Reload-safe selling tasks
* Automatic cleanup of Lazy Chests that no longer exist
* Fixed inventory interaction issues caused by overly broad event cancellation

---

## How To Use

### Giving a Lazy Chest

Admins can give a Lazy Chest directly to a player:

```
/lazychest give <player>
```

The player can place the chest like a normal chest. Once placed, it becomes bound to the player and begins selling supported items automatically.

---

### Viewing All Lazy Chests (Admin GUI)

To open the admin interface listing all players with Lazy Chests:

```
/lazychest list
```

* Click a player head to view all Lazy Chests owned by that player
* Left-click a chest to teleport to it
* Right-click a chest to inspect its contents

---

### Pausing & Resuming Selling

Admins can temporarily disable selling without removing chests.

Pause selling for a specific player:

```
/lazychest pause <player>
```

Resume selling for a specific player:

```
/lazychest resume <player>
```

Pause selling for all Lazy Chests:

```
/lazychest pauseall
```

Resume selling for all Lazy Chests:

```
/lazychest resumeall
```

---

### Reloading the Plugin

To reload prices and configuration without restarting the server:

```
/lazychest reload
```

---

## Commands Summary

* `/lazychest give <player>` – Give a Lazy Chest to a player
* `/lazychest list` – Open the admin Lazy Chest GUI
* `/lazychest pause <player>` – Pause selling for a player’s Lazy Chests
* `/lazychest resume <player>` – Resume selling for a player’s Lazy Chests
* `/lazychest pauseall` – Pause selling for all Lazy Chests
* `/lazychest resumeall` – Resume selling for all Lazy Chests
* `/lazychest reload` – Reload configuration and prices

---

## Permissions

* `lazychests.give` – Allows giving Lazy Chests to players
* `lazychests.reload` – Allows reloading the plugin
* `lazychests.admin.list` – Allows opening the admin Lazy Chest GUI
* `lazychests.admin.teleport` – Allows teleporting to Lazy Chests
* `lazychests.admin.inspect` – Allows inspecting Lazy Chest inventories

### Lazy Chest Limits

* `lazychests.limit.1` – Allows 1 Lazy Chest
* `lazychests.limit.2` – Allows 2 Lazy Chests
* `lazychests.limit.3` – Allows 3 Lazy Chests
* `lazychests.limit.4` – Allows 4 Lazy Chests
* `lazychests.limit.5` – Allows 5 Lazy Chests
* `lazychests.limit.unlimited` – Allows unlimited Lazy Chests

---

Elevate your server’s economy with a reliable, configurable, and admin-friendly solution for automated item sales.
